subcodes.title: Words to reporters, spoken on 1912-09-11
subcodes.first_line: If we determine a beginning and an end for creation, it is as if we determine a beginning and an end for God. There can be no creator without a creation.
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر بگوئیم برای خلق اول و آخری است مثل اینست که از برای خدا اول و آخری معتقد شده ایم
subcodes.subjects: @God's attributes require the existence of objects, @divine emanation is ceaseless; eternal, @eternality vs. origination; creation from nothingness
